overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing two characters and a horse walking through a narrow desert canyon at night, illuminated by a lantern. The scene features realistic graphics with dramatic lighting contrasts between the warm lantern glow and the dark rocky environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow desert canyon passage with high rock walls

agents.ego_description: leading a horse through the canyon while following a companion character who walks ahead with a lantern

notable_agents.action: companion character walking ahead holding a lantern to light the path
horse being led by the player character, walking steadily along the trail

entered.detail: tall rocky canyon wall with rough texture rising on the left side of the path
steep rock face forming the right boundary of the narrow passage
narrow winding trail of dirt and loose rocks through the canyon floor
dark night sky with scattered clouds visible between the canyon walls

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a narrow desert canyon passage at night, with high rock walls on both sides creating an enclosed feeling. The player character leads a horse while following a companion who holds a lantern, casting warm light on the dirt path ahead. The canyon walls loom close on either side as the group progresses steadily through the winding trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: widening canyon trail with scattered vegetation

events.description: canyon widens significantly as the left wall recedes into the distance, opening up the space

agents.ego_description: continuing to lead the horse through the widening canyon as the path curves slightly to the right

notable_agents.action: companion character maintaining pace ahead with the lantern
horse continuing to walk calmly alongside the player

entered.detail: distant rock outcrops and canyon walls visible as the passage opens up on the left side

segments.scene_description: The canyon opens up into a wider passage as the left wall recedes into the distance, creating a more spacious environment. The path continues to wind through the desert terrain with scattered rocks and sparse vegetation visible in the lantern light. The group maintains their steady pace as the canyon geometry shifts from enclosed to more open.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow desert canyon that gradually expands into a more spacious passage. It begins within a tight rocky corridor at night, where the player character and a horse follow a companion whose lantern casts a warm, flickering glow against the looming walls. As the group progresses steadily along the winding dirt path, the oppressive feeling of the enclosed canyon begins to fade. The scene then opens up as the left wall recedes into the distance, shifting the environment from a claustrophobic passage to a wider desert terrain. Finally, the camera continues forward through the expanding space, revealing scattered rocks and sparse vegetation illuminated by the lantern light.
